class_scope: Class A only. Existing Class B/C/D signatures remain separate and are used only as negative controls through adapters.
primary_evidence: victim waveform explained by unknown-gain dI/dt or coil-voltage coupling
secondary_evidence: stable estimated ring frequency/Q under same wiring condition
coupling gain k changes with wire geometry / distance / clamp path
rejection_evidence: repeated clustered source edges, contact-bounce-like impulse train
no source-victim proportional fit after lag compensation
ringing exists but is not locked to a single coil collapse event
missed-pulse behavior where threshold logic misses a pulse without coil-source coupling
